<content>330: 
331:     const requestPayloadSha256 = await sha256Hex(
332:       JSON.stringify(buildDeploymentIdempotencyPayload(requestPayload))
333:     );
334: 
335:     const created = await createWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, {
336:       id: generateWorkspaceDeploymentId(),
337:       workspaceId,
338:       provider,
339:       idempotencyKey,
340:       requestPayload,
341:       requestPayloadSha256,
342:       maxRetries,
343:       provenance: requestPayload.provenance,
344:     });
345: 
346:     if (!created.reused) {
347:       await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
348:         workspaceId,
349:         deploymentId: created.deployment.id,
350:         eventType: 'deployment_created',
351:         payload: {
352:           provider,
353:           maxRetries,
354:           provenance: requestPayload.provenance,
355:         },
356:       });
357:     }
358: 
359:     if (provider === 'cloudflare_workers_assets' && created.deployment.status === 'queued') {
360:       const hasPrecheckPassed = await hasWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(
361:         env.DB,
362:         workspaceId,
363:         created.deployment.id,
364:         'deployment_provider_precheck_passed'
365:       );
366:       const hasPrecheckFailed = await hasWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(
367:         env.DB,
368:         workspaceId,
369:         created.deployment.id,
370:         'deployment_provider_precheck_failed'
371:       );
372:       const alreadyEnqueued = await hasWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(
373:         env.DB,
374:         workspaceId,
375:         created.deployment.id,
376:         'deployment_enqueued'
377:       );
378: 
379:       if (hasPrecheckFailed) {
380:         return jsonResponse(
381:           {
382:             error: created.deployment.error?.message ?? 'Provider precheck previously failed',
383:             code: created.deployment.error?.code ?? 'provider_deploy_failed',
384:           },
385:           400
386:         );
387:       }
388: 
389:       if (!hasPrecheckPassed && !alreadyEnqueued) {
390:         const claimTime = new Date().toISOString();
391:         const claimed = await env.DB
392:           .prepare(
393:             `UPDATE workspace_deployments
394:              SET error_code = 'provider_precheck_running',
395:                  error_message = 'Provider precheck in progress',
396:                  updated_at = ?
397:              WHERE id = ?
398:                AND workspace_id = ?
399:                AND status = 'queued'
400:                AND (error_code IS NULL OR error_code = 'retry_scheduled')`
401:           )
402:           .bind(claimTime, created.deployment.id, workspaceId)
403:           .run();
404: 
405:         if ((claimed.meta?.changes ?? 0) === 0) {
406:           const concurrent = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, created.deployment.id);
407:           if (concurrent) {
408:             return jsonResponse({ deployment: concurrent }, 200);
409:           }
410:         }
411: 
412:         try {
413:           const precheckChecks = await createWorkspaceDeployProvider(provider, env).precheck();
414:           const failed = precheckChecks.find((check) => !check.ok);
415:           if (failed) {
416:             const failureMessage = failed.details ?? 'Provider precheck failed';
417:             const now = new Date().toISOString();
418:             const failedUpdate = await env.DB
419:               .prepare(
420:                 `UPDATE workspace_deployments
421:                  SET status = 'failed',
422:                      error_code = ?,
423:                      error_message = ?,
424:                      finished_at = COALESCE(finished_at, ?),
425:                      updated_at = ?
426:                  WHERE id = ?
427:                    AND workspace_id = ?
428:                    AND status = 'queued'
429:                    AND error_code = 'provider_precheck_running'`
430:               )
431:               .bind(failed.code, failureMessage, now, now, created.deployment.id, workspaceId)
432:               .run();
433: 
434:             if ((failedUpdate.meta?.changes ?? 0) > 0) {
435:               await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
436:                 workspaceId,
437:                 deploymentId: created.deployment.id,
438:                 eventType: 'deployment_provider_precheck_failed',
439:                 payload: {
440:                   code: failed.code,
441:                   message: failureMessage,
442:                 },
443:               });
444:               await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
445:                 deploymentId: created.deployment.id,
446:                 status: 'failed',
447:                 errorCode: failed.code,
448:                 errorMessage: failureMessage,
449:               });
450:               return jsonResponse({ error: failureMessage, code: failed.code }, 400);
451:             }
452: 
453:             const concurrent = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, created.deployment.id);
454:             if (concurrent) {
455:               return jsonResponse({ deployment: concurrent }, 200);
456:             }
457:           }
458: 
459:           await env.DB
460:             .prepare(
461:               `UPDATE workspace_deployments
462:                SET error_code = NULL,
463:                    error_message = NULL,
464:                    updated_at = ?
465:                WHERE id = ?
466:                  AND workspace_id = ?
467:                  AND status = 'queued'
468:                  AND error_code = 'provider_precheck_running'`
469:             )
470:             .bind(new Date().toISOString(), created.deployment.id, workspaceId)
471:             .run();
472: 
473:           await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
474:             workspaceId,
475:             deploymentId: created.deployment.id,
476:             eventType: 'deployment_provider_precheck_passed',
477:             payload: {
478:               checks: precheckChecks,
479:             },
480:           });
481:         } catch (error) {
482:           const providerError = normalizeProviderError(error);
483:           const now = new Date().toISOString();
484:           const failedUpdate = await env.DB
485:             .prepare(
486:               `UPDATE workspace_deployments
487:                SET status = 'failed',
488:                    error_code = ?,
489:                    error_message = ?,
490:                    finished_at = COALESCE(finished_at, ?),
491:                    updated_at = ?
492:                WHERE id = ?
493:                  AND workspace_id = ?
494:                  AND status = 'queued'
495:                  AND error_code = 'provider_precheck_running'`
496:             )
497:             .bind(providerError.code, providerError.message, now, now, created.deployment.id, workspaceId)
498:             .run();
499: 
500:           if ((failedUpdate.meta?.changes ?? 0) > 0) {
501:             await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
502:               workspaceId,
503:               deploymentId: created.deployment.id,
504:               eventType: 'deployment_provider_precheck_failed',
505:               payload: {
506:                 code: providerError.code,
507:                 message: providerError.message,
508:               },
509:             });
510:             await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
511:               deploymentId: created.deployment.id,
512:               status: 'failed',
513:               errorCode: providerError.code,
514:               errorMessage: providerError.message,
515:             });
516:             return jsonResponse({ error: providerError.message, code: providerError.code }, 400);
517:           }
518: 
519:           const concurrent = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, created.deployment.id);
520:           if (concurrent) {
521:             return jsonResponse({ deployment: concurrent }, 200);
522:           }
523:         }
524:       }
525:     }
526: 
527:     const latestDeployment = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, created.deployment.id);
528:     const deploymentForQueue = latestDeployment ?? created.deployment;
529: 
530:     if (deploymentForQueue.status === 'queued') {
531:       const hasEnqueuedEvent = await hasWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(
532:         env.DB,
533:         workspaceId,
534:         deploymentForQueue.id,
535:         'deployment_enqueued'
536:       );
537:       const shouldRecoverQueued = created.reused && deploymentForQueue.error?.code === 'retry_scheduled';
538:       const hasRecoveredReenqueue = shouldRecoverQueued
539:         ? await hasWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentForQueue.id, 'deployment_reenqueue_recovered')
540:         : false;
541: 
542:       if (!hasEnqueuedEvent || (shouldRecoverQueued && !hasRecoveredReenqueue)) {
543:         if (env.WORKSPACE_DEPLOYS_QUEUE) {
544:           await env.WORKSPACE_DEPLOYS_QUEUE.send(
545:             createWorkspaceDeploymentQueueMessage(workspaceId, deploymentForQueue.id)
546:           );
547:         } else if (ctx) {
548:           ctx.waitUntil(
549:             runWorkspaceDeploymentInlineWithRetries(env, workspaceId, deploymentForQueue.id, deploymentForQueue.maxRetries + 1)
550:           );
551:         }
552: 
553:         await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
554:           workspaceId,
555:           deploymentId: deploymentForQueue.id,
556:           eventType: 'deployment_enqueued',
557:           payload: {
558:             mode: env.WORKSPACE_DEPLOYS_QUEUE ? 'queue' : 'inline',
559:             reused: created.reused,
560:           },
561:         });
562: 
563:         if (shouldRecoverQueued && !hasRecoveredReenqueue) {
564:           await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
565:             workspaceId,
566:             deploymentId: deploymentForQueue.id,
567:             eventType: 'deployment_reenqueue_recovered',
568:             payload: {
569:               reason: 'retry_scheduled_replay',
570:             },
571:           });
572:         }
573:       }
574:     }
575: 
576:     return jsonResponse({ deployment: deploymentForQueue }, created.reused ? 200 : 202);
577:   } catch (error) {
578:     if (error instanceof WorkspaceDeploymentIdempotencyConflictError) {
579:       return jsonResponse(
580:         {
581:           error: 'Idempotency key has already been used with different payload',
582:           code: 'idempotency_key_conflict',
583:         },
584:         409
585:       );
586:     }
587: 
588:     if (error instanceof SyntaxError) {
589:       return jsonResponse({ error: 'Invalid JSON body' }, 400);
590:     }
591: 
592:     const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
593:     return jsonResponse({ error: `Failed to create workspace deployment: ${message}` }, 500);
594:   }
595: }
596: 
597: export async function handleWorkspaceDeploymentPreflight(
598:   workspaceId: string,
599:   request: Request,
600:   env: Env
601: ): Promise<Response> {
602:   const enabled = await ensureWorkspaceDeployEnabled(env);
603:   if (enabled) {
604:     return enabled;
605:   }
606: 
607:   const workspaceCheck = await ensureWorkspaceReady(env, workspaceId);
608:   if (workspaceCheck) {
609:     return workspaceCheck;
610:   }
611: 
612:   let payload: Record<string, unknown> = {};
613:   try {
614:     const raw = await request.text();
615:     if (raw.trim()) {
616:       const parsed = JSON.parse(raw) as unknown;
617:       if (!parsed || typeof parsed !== 'object' || Array.isArray(parsed)) {
618:         return jsonResponse({ error: 'Request body must be a JSON object' }, 400);
619:       }
620:       payload = parsed as Record<string, unknown>;
621:     }
622:   } catch {
623:     return jsonResponse({ error: 'Invalid JSON body' }, 400);
624:   }
625: 
626:   const validation =
627:     payload.validation && typeof payload.validation === 'object' && !Array.isArray(payload.validation)
628:       ? (payload.validation as Record<string, unknown>)
629:       : {};
630:   const autoFix =
631:     payload.autoFix && typeof payload.autoFix === 'object' && !Array.isArray(payload.autoFix)
632:       ? (payload.autoFix as Record<string, unknown>)
633:       : {};
634:   const deploy =
635:     payload.deploy && typeof payload.deploy === 'object' && !Array.isArray(payload.deploy)
636:       ? (payload.deploy as Record<string, unknown>)
637:       : {};
638:   const providerInput = typeof payload.provider === 'string' ? payload.provider.trim() : '';
639:   if (providerInput && providerInput !== 'simulated' && providerInput !== 'cloudflare_workers_assets') {
640:     return jsonResponse(
641:       {
642:         preflight: {
643:           ok: false,
644:           toolchain: null,
645:           checks: [{ code: 'unsupported_deploy_provider', ok: false, details: `Unsupported provider: ${providerInput}` }],
646:           remediations: [],
647:         },
648:         nextAction: 'Use provider=cloudflare_workers_assets or provider=simulated.',
649:       },

(Showing lines 330-649 of 833. Use offset=650 to continue.)

21:     cancelRequestedAt: string | null;

2506: 
2507: export async function updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(
2508:   db: D1Database,
2509:   workspaceId: string,
2510:   input: {
2511:     deploymentId: string;
2512:     status: WorkspaceDeploymentStatus;
2513:     deployedUrl?: string | null;
2514:     deployedAt?: string | null;
2515:     errorCode?: string | null;
2516:     errorMessage?: string | null;
2517:   }
2518: ): Promise<void> {
2519:   const updates: string[] = [
2520:     'last_deployment_id = ?',
2521:     'last_deployment_status = ?',
2522:     'last_deployment_error_code = ?',
2523:     'last_deployment_error_message = ?',
2524:     'updated_at = ?',
2525:   ];
2526:   const values: Array<string | null> = [
2527:     input.deploymentId,
2528:     input.status,
2529:     input.errorCode ?? null,
2530:     input.errorMessage ?? null,
2531:     new Date().toISOString(),
2532:   ];
2533: 
2534:   if (input.deployedUrl !== undefined) {
2535:     updates.push('last_deployed_url = ?');
2536:     values.push(input.deployedUrl);
2537:   }
2538:   if (input.deployedAt !== undefined) {
2539:     updates.push('last_deployed_at = ?');
2540:     values.push(input.deployedAt);
2541:   }
2542: 
2543:   values.push(workspaceId);
2544:   values.push(input.deploymentId);
2545:   await db
2546:     .prepare(
2547:       `UPDATE workspaces
2548:        SET ${updates.join(', ')}
2549:        WHERE id = ?
2550:          AND EXISTS (
2551:            SELECT 1
2552:            FROM workspace_deployments candidate
2553:            LEFT JOIN workspace_deployments current ON current.id = workspaces.last_deployment_id
2554:            WHERE candidate.id = ?
2555:              AND candidate.workspace_id = workspaces.id
2556:              AND (
2557:                workspaces.last_deployment_id IS NULL
2558:                OR current.id IS NULL
2559:                OR workspaces.last_deployment_id = candidate.id
2560:                OR julianday(candidate.created_at) > julianday(current.created_at)
2561:                OR (
2562:                  julianday(candidate.created_at) = julianday(current.created_at)
2563:                  AND (current.id IS NULL OR candidate.rowid >= current.rowid)
2564:                )
2565:              )
2566:          )`
2567:     )
2568:     .bind(...values)
2569:     .run();
2570: }

(End of file - total 2570 lines)
</content>

18: import { runWorkspaceToolchainTests } from './workspace-toolchain.test.js';

20: 
21: type TestCase = {
22:   name: string;
23:   run: () => void | Promise<void>;
24: };
25: 
26: const TEST_CASES: TestCase[] = [
27:   { name: 'state-machine', run: runStateMachineTests },
28:   { name: 'runtime-flags', run: runFlagsTests },
29:   { name: 'checkpoint-queue', run: runCheckpointQueueTests },
30:   { name: 'checkpoint-plan', run: runCheckpointPlanTests },
31:   { name: 'checkpoint-runner', run: runCheckpointRunnerTests },

34:   { name: 'workspace-api', run: runWorkspaceApiTests },
35:   { name: 'workspace-task-queue', run: runWorkspaceTaskQueueTests },
36:   { name: 'workspace-task-runner', run: runWorkspaceTaskRunnerTests },
37:   { name: 'workspace-task-api', run: runWorkspaceTaskApiTests },
38:   { name: 'workspace-deployment-queue', run: runWorkspaceDeploymentQueueTests },
39:   { name: 'workspace-deployment-runner', run: runWorkspaceDeploymentRunnerTests },
40:   { name: 'workspace-deployment-api', run: runWorkspaceDeploymentApiTests },
41:   { name: 'workspace-toolchain', run: runWorkspaceToolchainTests },
42:   { name: 'workspace-deploy-provider', run: runWorkspaceDeployProviderTests },
43:   { name: 'job-events-api', run: runJobEventsApiTests },
44:   { name: 'checkpoint-db', run: runCheckpointDbTests },
45:   { name: 'checkpoint-jobs-api', run: runCheckpointJobsApiTests },
46: ];
47: 
48: async function main(): Promise<void> {
49:   let failed = 0;
50: 
51:   for (const testCase of TEST_CASES) {
52:     try {
53:       await testCase.run();
54:       console.log(`PASS ${testCase.name}`);
55:     } catch (error) {
56:       failed += 1;
57:       const message = error instanceof Error ? error.stack || error.message : String(error);
58:       console.error(`FAIL ${testCase.name}`);
59:       console.error(message);
60:     }
61:   }
62: 
63:   if (failed > 0) {
64:     process.exit(1);
65:   }
66: 
67:   console.log(`All tests passed (${TEST_CASES.length})`);
68: }
69: 
70: main().catch((error) => {
71:   const message = error instanceof Error ? error.stack || error.message : String(error);
72:   console.error('Test runner crashed');
73:   console.error(message);
74:   process.exit(1);
75: });

parts.text:
No blocking issues found.

I verified `packages/worker/src/api/workspace-deployments.ts` and the workspace summary is now updated in both provider precheck failure paths:
- failed precheck check result (`updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary` at `packages/worker/src/api/workspace-deployments.ts:444`)
- thrown provider precheck error (`updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary` at `packages/worker/src/api/workspace-deployments.ts:510`)

I also ran the worker test suite (`npm test` in `packages/worker`), and `workspace-deployment-api` passed along with the full suite.
